name: Healthcare Compliance and De-identification Assessment
description: Compliance review of healthcare company using fine-tuned models on de-identified patient data with quasi-identifiers, synthetic data, and HIPAA/GDPR compliance requirements
prompt: Review a healthcare company's AI governance and compliance posture. The company fine-tunes models on data they claim is de-identified, but the data still contains quasi-identifiers. They use synthetic data generation and must comply with HIPAA and GDPR. Identify compliance gaps, explain the erasure gap, recommend differential privacy approaches, and suggest quasi-identifier suppression strategies.
expected_outcome: Should identify DSGAI10, DSGAI08, DSGAI07, DSGAI18 with explanation of erasure gaps, recommend differential privacy approaches, and provide quasi-identifier suppression recommendations
